backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing client management, interventions, user profiles, blacklist operations, technical folder storage, and role-based access control with authorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON structure with no features documented.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files including pages, hooks, components, and their French localization status.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining colors for UI components, charts, and sidebar elements.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with PWA meta tags, French language setting, manifest links, iOS-specific configurations, and noscript fallback message.
frontend/public/manifest.webmanifest: PWA manifest defining app metadata, icons, display mode, theme colors, and orientation for Vial Traite Service application.
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker implementing cache-first strategy for assets, network-first for navigation, and automatic cache cleanup on activation.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with routes for login, clients, dossiers, technical folder, and dashboard, wrapped with React Query, Internet Identity provider, error boundaries, and profile setup dialog.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminUnloc: Empty file placeholder for admin unlock dialog component.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal dialog forcing new users to enter their name on first login with form validation and save functionality using React Hook Form.
frontend/src/components/blacklist/Blackl: Displays and manages client blacklist status with comments and media attachments. Allows marking/unmarking clients as blacklisted with file upload support.
frontend/src/components/clients/CreateCl: Modal dialog form for creating new clients with required fields (name, address, city, state, zip) and optional phone/email fields.
frontend/src/components/clients/EditClie: Modal dialog form for editing existing client information, pre-populated with current client data.
Reusable badge component with custom variants (success, warning, pending) and styling support.
frontend/src/components/common/ErrorBoun: React error boundary component that catches errors and displays a user-friendly error UI with retry and reload options.
frontend/src/components/export/ExportDat: Modal dialog for exporting application data in JSON or PDF format with progress indicator.
frontend/src/components/guards/Authentic: Route guard component that redirects unauthenticated users to home page and shows loading state during authentication check.
frontend/src/components/interventions/Ad: Dialog component for adding new interventions with date inputs, comments, and media capture/upload functionality. Submits intervention data to backend and resets form on success.
frontend/src/components/interventions/Ed: Dialog component for editing existing interventions, pre-populating form fields with intervention data. Allows updating date, comments, and media attachments.
frontend/src/components/interventions/In: Read-only dialog displaying full intervention details including date, author, comments, and media. Shows edit button if user has edit permissions.
Lists all interventions for a client with loading/error states, retry functionality, and action buttons for add/edit/delete. Includes confirmation dialog for deletions.
frontend/src/components/layout/MobileLay: Main mobile layout wrapper with sticky header showing logo and user profile, logout button, dashboard navigation, and footer with attribution. Includes connectivity status bar.
frontend/src/components/media/FilePicker: Simple file picker button component that programmatically creates and triggers a file input element with configurable accept types and multiple file support.
frontend/src/components/media/MediaPicke: Media selection component offering both camera capture and gallery selection options. Includes camera dialog with live preview and capture functionality using custom useCamera hook.
frontend/src/components/media/MediaPrevi: Displays a grid of media thumbnails (images) with error handling and optional click-to-view functionality that opens a DocumentViewer modal.
frontend/src/components/sync/Connectivit: Shows a status bar indicating online/offline state and pending sync operations count, with a manual sync button when online.
frontend/src/components/technical-folder: Modal dialog for creating new folders with path validation (no slashes allowed) and displays the full destination path.
Full-featured document viewer modal supporting images, PDFs, and videos with zoom, rotation, fullscreen, pinch-to-zoom, and download capabilities.
Returns appropriate Lucide icon component based on file extension (images, PDFs, videos, documents, spreadsheets).
Modal dialog with breadcrumb navigation allowing users to browse folder structure and select a destination folder for moving files.
Modal dialog for renaming folders with validation to prevent slashes and duplicate names.
Card component displaying a file with thumbnail preview and action buttons for viewing, moving, and deleting, with confirmation dialogs.
Dialog component for uploading files to the technical folder with file selection, name input, progress tracking, and path display.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that manages the backend actor instance, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity and initializing access control with admin token.
frontend/src/hooks/useBlacklist.ts: Provides mutations for marking and unmarking clients as blacklisted with comments and media attachments, invalidating related queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useClients.ts: React hooks for fetching, creating, and updating clients with offline support, retry logic, and query invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useCurrentUser.ts: Hooks for fetching and saving user profiles, including the caller's profile and specific user profiles by Principal.
frontend/src/hooks/useDataExport.ts: Hook for exporting all application data (clients, interventions, technical files) to JSON or text format with progress tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useInterventions.ts: Provides React Query hooks for managing interventions (add, update, delete, get by client/date) with offline support via operation queueing and error handling with toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useOnlineStatus.ts: Custom React hook that tracks browser online/offline status using navigator.onLine and window events.
frontend/src/hooks/useSync.ts: Hook that monitors pending offline operations and automatically triggers synchronization when online, exposing sync status and manual sync trigger.
frontend/src/hooks/useTechnicalFolder.ts: React Query hooks for managing technical files including list, upload, delete, move, and create folder operations with error handling and cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom Vial Traite Service brand colors (blue, green, orange) and theme variables for light/dark modes, plus safe-area utilities for mobile.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility function that combines clsx and tailwind-merge for conditional CSS class merging.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient, InternetIdentityProvider, and renders the main App component.
frontend/src/offline/db.ts: IndexedDB wrapper providing operations for offline data management with 'outbox' store for pending operations and 'cache' store for cached data.
frontend/src/offline/outbox.ts: IndexedDB interface for queueing, retrieving, and removing offline operations with timestamp-indexed storage.
frontend/src/offline/syncEngine.ts: Processes queued offline operations by replaying them through the backend actor, handling various operation types (client CRUD, interventions, blacklist) with error recovery.
frontend/src/pages/ClientDossierPage.tsx: Displays detailed client information including contact details, interventions, and blacklist status. Provides edit functionality and navigation back to the clients list.
frontend/src/pages/ClientsPage.tsx: Lists all clients with search functionality and displays client cards showing address and blacklist status. Includes a dialog to create new clients.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Shows a calendar for date selection and displays interventions scheduled for the selected date. Includes intervention details dialog and error handling with retry functionality.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Handles Internet Identity authentication with a login button and loading states. Redirects authenticated users to the clients page.
frontend/src/pages/TechnicalFolderPage.t: Manages technical files and folders with breadcrumb navigation, upload functionality, and folder creation. Displays files and folders for the current path with error handling.
frontend/src/pwa/registerServiceWorker.t: Registers the service worker for PWA functionality after page load with a 1-second delay to avoid blocking initial render.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for extracting URL parameters from query strings or hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence and cleanup capabilities.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining custom color palette using OKLCH color space, container settings, border radius variables, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project metadata file tracking feature requests, with one pending request (AR-1) to restore application code to Version 15 state.
